narration: Robotics teams collect more sessions than any human can review end-to-end. Logs, video, controller behavior, sensor traces — the evidence is there, but the forensic work is still manual.

beats.name: title + tree
beats.content: 'Evidence grows. Review doesn\'t scale.' + scrolling repo tree -L 2

beats.name: folder sweep
beats.content: 5 real folder-listing panels stagger-in (data/bags, demo_assets/bag_footage, bench cases, scripts/, docs/)

beats.name: evidence tiles
beats.content: 5-tile grid (video frame, controller code, rosbag trace, RTK plot, costs log) with amber outline traversing each

beats.name: lockup
beats.content: Dimmed tile bg; 'Too much evidence.' over 'Manual forensic work.' with amber divider

source_assets_used: repo folder listings: data/bags/, demo_assets/bag_footage/, black-box-bench/cases/, scripts/, docs/
repo tree -L 2 (hand-curated from real top-level layout)
controller snippet modeled on src/black_box/synthesis/controllers.py PIDController.step
rosbag info header modeled on 1_cam-lidar.bag (55.8 GB, 42 topics)
text_overlays_used: Logs · Video · Controller behavior · Sensor traces
the evidence is there. the forensic work is still manual.
one session · 55.8 GB · 42 topics · 7 bug classes
edits_performed: beat A: eased tree scroll-in (60px over 2.2s)
beat B: 5 listing panels stagger-in 280ms apart, 40px slide-up + fade
beat C: 5 evidence tiles stagger-in 180ms apart, amber 4px outline traverses tile-by-tile 1.0–3.6s
beat D: previous tile composite dimmed to 22% alpha behind centered lockup typography
vignette and 80px grid backdrop on every beat for visual continuity with block_01
remaining_work: optional: swap car_1 frame for cam1 hero if editorial prefers a different session
optional: add a subtle audio bed in final edit (not part of this asset)
optional: extend to 14.0s if VO cadence requires (pad lockup beat by 500ms)
